heading: Volunteers
label: 6810 Volunteers
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsecs. (b) to (d), was in the original a reference to section 5, and was translated as meaning , to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Section 6804 of this titlesection 805 of title VIII of div. J of Pub. L. 108–447

children.heading: Authority to use volunteers
children.label: a Authority to use volunteers
children.text: The Secretary may use volunteers, as appropriate, to collect recreation fees and sell recreation passes.

children.heading: Waiver or discount of fees; site-specific agency pass
children.label: b Waiver or discount of fees; site-specific agency pass
children.text: In exchange for volunteer services, the Secretary may waive or discount an entrance fee, standard amenity recreation fee, or an expanded amenity recreation fee that would otherwise apply to the volunteer or issue to the volunteer a site-specific agency pass authorized under .section 6804(c) of this title

children.heading: National Parks and Federal Recreational Lands Pass
children.label: c National Parks and Federal Recreational Lands Pass
children.text: In accordance with the guidelines issued under , the Secretaries may issue a National Parks and Federal Recreational Lands Pass to a volunteer in exchange for significant volunteer services performed by the volunteer.section 6804(a)(7) of this title

children.heading: Regional multientity passes
children.label: d Regional multientity passes
children.text: The Secretary may issue a regional multientity pass authorized under to a volunteer in exchange for significant volunteer services performed by the volunteer, if the regional multientity pass agreement under which the regional multientity pass was established provides for the issuance of the pass to volunteers.section 6804(d) of this title
